# Never use @gmail.com for your business (Here's why)

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-02-07 14:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 507

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Quick question: Which email address creates the best first
impression?

- john.businessname @ gmail.com

- john @ businessname.com

Of course, it’s the second!

Unfortunately, many website owners settle for a boring email
address, like the first one above, for their business because
it’s FREE of cost.

Little did they know that they could also set up a business email
without paying a penny.

I've published a complete guide showing you how to create a
professional business email address that is completely FREE. Yes,
you read that right - FREE!

👉 How to set up your free business email address 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..uUI10p6qAR85KWdvMv9GQcC6mpILz-AHBpGZMrepKk8 )
 👈

Imagine sending emails from your very own professional address
(you @ yourbusiness.com) and instantly boosting your credibility
with every message you send.

The best part... it only takes a few minutes to set up, and you
can send emails with your own professional email address forever!

Cheers,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
